title: taraxacum longihastatum
intro: Taraxacum longihastatum, a rare species of dandelion, is a perennial plant native to China, characterized by its long stems and hairy leaves. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits associated with Taraxacum longihastatum include its potential to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Taraxacum longihastatum is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried root to utilize its medicinal properties, although its availability and use may vary depending on the region.
